title: poa aequatoriensis
intro: Poa aequatoriensis, also known as Ecuadorian meadow grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Poa aequatoriensis include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe sore throats, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Poa aequatoriensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the dried leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical remedies.
